mapper.select: SELECT id, category, sub_category, detail_name, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reference_product_family ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, category, sub_category, detail_name, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM reference_product_family WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM reference_product_family ORDER BY category
mapper.update: UPDATE reference_product_family SET category = #{category}, sub_category = #{subCategory}, detail_name = #{detailName}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
